violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and placed out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The floors, walls, and ceiling throughout the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Multiple ceiling tiles in the storefront area and walk-in cooler ceiling is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2026

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt and black residue. Inspector observed previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The walls in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt and black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
